review_title: Flexible and powerful CRM and lead management system for big sales teams
description: Salesforce sales cloud helped the team organize the sales process and communicate well on leads, even with most of the team working remote/on the field.
author: Svetla M.
pros: The system can work great no matter if your sales team is small or big, it has all the functionality and integrations you may need
cons: The learning curve is a bit steep, particularly as concerns integrations and more advanced functionality

review_title: Salesforce is the dedicated CRM for Sales
description: We've been able to log more information about calls, which has helped us make sure different personnel aren't calling the same clients. We fixed a problem where different salesmen were calling the same new leads, and we made it possible to assign specific goals to individual workers.
author: Becky F.
pros: For our company, Salesforce has been a godsend. It helped tremendously with planning ahead and scheduling calls and follow-ups. Connecting Salesforce and Outlook has been really helpful for me because it streamlines my tracking and allows me to go back and add any missing details from my day.
cons: It's usually more expensive than competing CRMs, but you may offset that by buying extra licenses for users, whether they're on the platform or not.

review_title: Not a user friendly program for simple sales tasks
description: Our team used an integration that did not work well for our company and caused a lot of confusion during a poor transition.
author: Mary C.
pros: SalesForce offered the ability to have many data tags associated with a given client so that more complex reporting and sorting could be accomplished.
cons: The program felt clunky, not user friendly and hard to sort data for simple sales metrics. It required a lot of data to be entered to add a single piece of information for lead management.

description: Salesforce Customer360 overall has been positive and is able to organize the customers information with ease. Being able to see everything you need to know about a customer in one source makes navigating a breeze.
author: Joshua S.
pros: I enjoyed the ability to be able to locate all of members information all in one spot. I am able to view customer details to research issues and guide them as needed.
cons: It can be a hassle when it comes to training and your company utilizes different versions of Salesforce. There does not seem to be a super user access and so switching access between the different versions of Salesforce can be a little troublesome.

description: It is great! Overall the main tools I used daily were awesome and always found new ways to play with them and use them to my job better. Just some minor glitches.
author: Lizandro H.
pros: The main features like the pipeline management and division. All the data of your lead on the main page without having to go in to your lead. The ability to have tabs within the tabs for an easier experience having multiple leads open.
cons: That the task you set up for reminders or calls was not working 40% of the time. 10% of the time the leads did not go off your pipeline after calling them or when you remove them.

review_title: How to matur a young sales team
description: If it weren't for Salesforce Cloud, My team would have taken months longer to ramp up and mature. From the get-go we used the pipeline tools to see and manage our efforts and quickly saw what efforts had the most impact. This gave us the ability to be more dynamic from campaign to campaign making strategic decisions on the fly and in allocating budget.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: From the day it was "turned on," I was able to use tools to train, mentor, and mature my sales team. Visual tools and reporting were incredibly helpful to a team that was learning and growing.
cons: The cost and customizations required sometimes can be a lot but when done properly, those customizations are worth their weight in gold.

review_title: Helps as a company create good commercial strategies
description: It allows you to have real-time reports on each specific client without being expensive. In my organization, I required a system capable of grouping and sectioning each client to know their interests and offer them the best.
author: Natalia S.
pros: I like it because it allows the monitoring of each client individually, so that when creating strategies this solution works as an organizer, manager and organizer for better business processes, I like it because it is not complicated to manage so in financial areas and marketing is positioned as a profitable and sustainable alternative for companies
cons: I have no problems regarding the work procedures in which the employment has been reliable and safe.

review_title: Sales Cloud by Salesforce is a Sales Professional’s best friend!
description: Overall, my experience with salesforce sales cloud was great. The company provides a lot of essential tools for sales professionals. Although the platform is expensive, If you’re looking to scale your sales team, this platform is very helpful.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I would say both the pipeline feature and contact management were my two favourite features. In sales, being able to relay accurate data and potential sales during company meetings/money huddles are key in predicting company sustainability and growth. Having my pipeline right in front of me made me feel very confident when reporting to my Sales Manager. The contact management side of Salesforce was also excellent. Being able to keep a clean and organized database of contacts is very helpful. I also liked how we are able to review messages and history with each contact.
cons: I would say some of the sales hub knowledge material was a little out dated from time to time. This might be a bit picky, as most of the content was good.

review_title: Enhance your Business Development with Salesforce Sales Cloud
description: As a system engineer, I'm working on a Supply chain management project for our client and there our team is working on Salesforce Sales Cloud and It is well suited for our project's requirements. It maintains and perform analytics on the database related to material management, dispatches, payments for our client.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Best feature it offers is customization, This cloud fits for everyone's need starting from micro enterprise to large scale industries. It is well integrated with other platforms to perform analytics, real time monitoring. It offers User friendly UI
cons: Data optimization needed to avoid extra cost of data and Training modules should be provided for new users.

description: I think this is a great product if you have a large database of clients. Huge benefit is easy access to information, easily search anything. Being able to call and email by clicking on contact info makes things faster.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked how easily you could pull up customers' information and find what you needed.
cons: The layout is not the cleanest. I would like to see it be less cluttered.

description: I love to keep my leads at one place and save time also helps me to be more productive.
author: Prakash G.
pros: I love to keep my leads at one place and save time also helps me to be more productive.
cons: I like everything about Salesforce! there is nothing I can think of :)

description: Having worked in sales for over 10 years I can confidently say that Salesforce has been nothing short of amazing. It's transformed the way I do my job!
author: kaan C.
pros: Salesforce's analytics and reporting tools are a invaluable to me, Ican gain valuable insights into my sales performance over the years, quarter and month and identify opportunities.
cons: occasional lags and slow loading times, particularly when dealing with large datasets

description: Overall Salesforce has been one of my favorite programs to use both as an employee and now an owner.
author: Meghann H.
pros: I love it's efficacy and ease of use for the end user.
cons: Occasionally it's too much like social media with the comments and less like a team working together.

review_title: Great CRM for all your business needs
description: Overall, it's a great CRM, that integrates with so many other tools, and allows you to have 1 source of truth for all business operations and data.
author: Brigita B.
pros: It's so robust and makes it easy to navigate for your contacts to accounts to leads & so on! Very customizable, and is able to handle the unique sales processes at our organization smoothly.
cons: The look and feel sometimes is too monotone, but that's a minor concern.

description: Aside from putting so much details before case is created, it is helpful in a way it store customer information accurately.
author: Leonora C.
pros: It can store customer information, comments accurately.
cons: It seems that before we complete the case there are so many information to put in.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, my experience with salesforce has been very good. It has cut down a large amount of time off of daily tasks.
author: Bryce J.
pros: As most of my job is handled digitially, Salesforces makes tracking data a breeze!
cons: Sometimes it can be a little laggy, but as most cloud based companies are never perfect, you cannot knock it for that alone.

description: You get what you pay for, as I usually say, and Salesforce is no exception. It's a significant investment to integrate Salesforce into your software stack, but it will most likely pay for itself. Salesforce is quite powerful for automation and data collection. It is the best CRM I have ever used because I can add various sections (objects), fields, reports, and rules in a matter of minutes.
author: Destiny B.
pros: The best part of Salesforce Sales Cloud is the ability to manage and monitor everyday operations inside each account. It makes it possible to stay up to date on ongoing actions and guarantees regular, thorough visibility into each account's development.
cons: The mobile application is excellent and really helpful, however I don't like how expensive this platform is. I've had a positive overall experience with this platform.

description: I would recommend based on a companys specific needs and business goals.
author: Giuliana A.
pros: Its widely recognized and appreciated. Many organizations have positive experienced.
cons: For some businesses, the costs associated with Salesforce may be considered high, especially for smaller businesses or startups.

review_title: Salesforce: a useful tool for non profits of all sizes
description: We have really enjoyed using sales force. Having one system to monitor all of our important engagement data is a huge plus. In the past i've worked at non profits that employ a different system for every type of metric, so instead of everything being in one place, you have to login to multiple sites and it takes alot more of my time to gather all the information needed to successfully target a fundraising campaign. This frees up my time to work on more important day to day operations and not have to spend so much time in the office gathering data from different places and putting it together manually.
author: Andrew M.
pros: My favorite parts of salesforce have to be having a central database where we can store all of our information regarding engagements. From clients, to donors, to volunteers, and even board members. We use it to keep track of all types of information and it allows us to target specific "high value" donors who are more likely to donate based on previous donation history. It makes it very easy for us with just a few clicks to see all the information we need to successfully run a fundraising campaign and get it to the right people.
cons: It could be a little more intuitive, this may be a byproduct of having so many features. Sometimes it is a little difficult to navigate for people who aren't as familiar with salesforce. Sometimes we get volunteers that prefer to volunteer by assisting with admin tasks. Sometimes we run into issues where generally tech saavy people have trouble navigating and using some of the features in sales force. Again this is probably because it has so many features that are very indepth, not necessarily a bad thing.

description: The system is vastly superior to other alternative platforms. The system is sleek and very user friendly.
author: Daniel F.
pros: The fresh look and integration to link to other system is a nice touch. The font layout and design is very useful for everyday use. Nice to see the system evolve in the right way over the years of use.
cons: There can be occasions when the system is slow to use or encounters errors in time this has got much better and the overall experience has got better month on month.

review_title: Manage your Sales Process with Ease
description: Overall it is an excellent product to manage the sales process. My experience was positive and I would definitely recommend it to others.
author: Eugene D.
pros: The best part is the ability to manage assign and track the entire sales process even with sales teams spread all over the country without having to manage a server in house.
cons: The learning curve is a little steep for Salesforce in general, however the Salesforce help sections, training material, and robust user community make solving problems and getting answers to questions pretty easy.

description: Its a great tool to centralise customer information and avoid repetitive tasks.
author: Faith D.
pros: It is a comprehensive customer relationship management solution that incorporates the different function of the business like sales marketing and customer service. I loved that it simplifies the management of customer interactions at different levels.
cons: Initially it can be difficult for new users who do not have any knowledge about the platform. Some learning or training might need to be undertaken to navigate the platform effectively.

description: It has really helped me generate new leads and boost my sales by a huge margin
author: Isaiah N.
pros: Its feature of lead generation. It has really helped me get new prospects and closed more sales
cons: At first i felt it had too many features and felt confusing.

description: Great, I also use hubspot but prefer Salesforce much more. Hubspot is too complicated and not user friendly.
author: Shiori I.
pros: My favorite part about about Salesforce as a manager is the activity status of where I can see how many calls were taken. I also love that you can connect it to other platforms.
cons: Duplicate leads, causes issues amongst employees .

description: I have a great experience using salesforce sales cloud. Easy to navigate and user friendly application.
author: argel M.
pros: We use salesforce in our daily work. User friendly and easy to navigate the tool. Easy to communicate with other member.
cons: As far as I know, I didn't encounter any problem using this tool. It is a big help for us specially on our daily work.
